message:
feat(recorder): add backend-agnostic audit chain verification with telemetry

Add verify_chain_for_backend() to AuditLog that records
RecorderBackendKind in ChainVerification and emits structured
info-level logs with backend tag. Documents ownership boundary:
AuditLog owns chain integrity independently of RecorderStorage.

9 new tests for backend-agnostic audit chain verification.

Closes: ft-2vuw7.1.4.1.1.2.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
